snippet.title: LALIBAZAR | Official Movie Trailer | Swastima Khadka, Rabindra Singh Baniya, Samaira, Prashamsha
snippet.description:
LALIBAZAR - New Nepali Movie Official Trailer 2026 || Swastima Khadka, Bishal Devkota, Rabindra Singh Baniya, Samaira Thapa, Prashamsa Subedi, Mukunda Kumar Shrestha, Abaya Baral, Asha Poudel, Govinda Sunar, Abha Aryal, Tara Sharma, Ramesh Badi, Nabaraj Regmi, Ghana Shyam Joshi, Pradip Dhakal, Mohan Panthi, JB Ruwali, Swarasoti Adhikari, Bhumika Tharu, Sagar Ghimire,Haroon Ali, Prem Pandey || Lalibazar New Nepali Full Movie 2026


Movie - LALIBAZAR
In Cinemas - Baisakh 18, 2083 ( 1st May 2026)

Story/Director: Yam Thapa
Screen Play/Dialouge: Pradip Bhattarai/Yam Thapa
Chief Asst. Director: Aaksh Ukheda
2nd Asst. Director: Jeeban Dhungel
3rd Asst. Director: Yam Bahadur Karki
Creative Director: JB Ruwali
Fight Director: Samrat Basnet
Artist Coordinator: Jhaken BC
Executive Producer: Pradip Bhattarai
Producers: Rabindra Singh Baniya, Max Dipesh Khatri

Account Head: Nirajan Pyakurel
Head of Production: Rupak Pratap Adhikari
Production Asst : Rajkumar Nagarkoti
Local Coordinator: Deepak Chaudhary
Director of Photography: Sushan Prajapati
Gaffer/Focus Puller: Purushattam Purajuli
Drone Operator: Krezal Chaudhary
Light: Shushil Adhikari Khatri, Kamal Kuwar, Dhurba Shrestha, Lokendra Khadka, Rajan Sarki

Still Photography / BTS: Matika Films (Keshab)
DIT/Online Editor: Raj Kumar Karki
Editor: Mitra Dev Gurung
Color Correction: Renish Phago
VFX: Samir Miya/Satyam Rana
Background Music/Mixing: Rohit Shakya, Shailesh Shrestha
Dubbing: Radip Shrestha

Trident Concept Team 
Poster / Publicity Design: Royal Bhimsen (Trident Concept)
Publicity Manager : Gyanu Sangam Khadka (Trident Concept)
Graphic Designer : Bibek Khakurel (Trident Concept)

Art Director: Umesh Chaudhary
Art Assistants: Chakra Bista, Ganesh Baniya
Prop Masters: Sameer Chaudhary, Ram Kumar Chaudhary
Art Local: Man Bahadur Chaudhary
Costume Designer / Stylist: Janaki Kadayat
Costume Manager: Sandhya Rana
Assistant (Costume): Tek Raj Rana
Makeup Artist: Kavya Thapa
Hair Dresser: Meera Subedi
Sound Production: Sagar Ghimire
Lyrics/Songs: Prakash Saput, Khem Century,Ramesh BG, Jayan J Waiba
Kitchen Head: Kedar Shapkota And Team
Spot Boys: Manoj Tamang, Jit Magar, Sumesh Nepali, Iswor Nepal
Transportation: Binam Krishan Tomat, Shyam Lama,Binod,Roshan
Post Production: Nepalese Hands
Media Coordinatror : CP Jaisi (Dinesh Sitaula Films)
Media Content Writer/Adviser: Bhesh Raj Karki (Pradip Karki)

snippet.title: PATI PATNI AUR WOH DO (Teaser) | Ayushmann, Wamiqa, Sara, Rakul | Mudassar, Bhushan K, Juno | 15 May
snippet.description:
Samay sab kuch badal deta hai…
par patiyon ki fitrat uske bhi bas mein nahi 😬

Aa rahe hain Prajapati Pandey…
is baar apni Patni aur Woh Do ke saath! 😉

Presenting the Official Teaser of Pati Patni Aur Woh Do Starring Ayushmann Khurrana , Sara Ali Khan, Wamiqa Gabbi ,Rakul Preet Singh,Vijay Raaz, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Vishal Vasistha, Guneet Singh, Durgesh Kumar, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Shireesh Kumar Sharma and Deepika Amin 

#PatiPatniAurWohDo in cinemas worldwide 15th May 2026!

Gulshan Kumar, B.R. Chopra & T-Series Present
​A T-Series Films & B.R. Studios Production

"Pati Patni Aur Woh Do"

​Directed By: Mudassar Aziz
​Produced By: Bhushan Kumar, Renu Ravi Chopra, Krishan Kumar
​Creative Producer: Juno Chopra
​Co-producer: Shiv Chanana
​President (T-Series): Neeraj Kalyan
​Story & Dialogues: Mudassar Aziz
​Screenplay: Ravi Kumar & Mudassar Aziz
​Cinematographer: Jishnu Bhattacharjee
​Editor: Ninad Khanolkar
​Associate Producer: Aneesh Mohan
​Production Design: Manini Mishra
​Costume Designers: Manish Malhotra, Aki Narula, Ipshita Bhatnagar
​Original Background Score: Ketan Sodha
​Sound Design: Arun Nambiar
​Re-recording Mixer: Debajit Changmai
​Action Director: Amar Shetty
​Music: Rajesh Roshan, Rochak Kohli, Tanishk Bagchi,Neelkamal Singh,Tony Kakkar,Badshah, Devv Sadaana, 
​Lyrics: Indeevar, Kumaar, Kunaal Vermaa, Badshah, Neelkamal Singh,Arslan Nizami
​Choreographer: Bosco Leslie Martis, Piyush-Shazia
​Casting By: Vaibhav Vishant (Anti Casting)
​Associate Director: Rohini Bisht

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Hindi Trailer | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
A legacy that built Swarajya. A story that shaped history. 🚩

Proudly presenting the trailer of Raja Shivaji.

Based on the life of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj - the Founder of Hindavi Swarajya.


Raja Shivaji in cinemas on 1st May 2026.
Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Written, Produced, Directed By: Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced By: Genelia Deshmukh
Music By: Ajay – Atul
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)
In Cinemas 1st May
A Jio Studios Release
 
Story Screenplay: Ajit Wadikar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue Writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi Dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production Designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Oak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
VFX Head of Production: Swapnil Khotkar
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Visual Promotion: Just Right Studioz NX
 
Jio Studios Team:
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production & Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Head – Marathi Content: Nikhil Sane
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu
 
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu
 
#RajaShivajiTrailer #RiteishDeshmukh #SanjayDutt, #AbhishekBachchan, #VidyaBalan, #SachinKhedekar, #Bhagyashree, #FardeenKhan, #JitendraJoshi, #AmoleGupte, #BomanIrani, #JyotiDeshpande, #GeneliaDeshmukh, #AjayAtul #RemoDsouza

Yahi ho 2026 PUBG MOBILE National Championship South Asia Finals ko antim adhyay. Kati din samma bhayeko intense battles pachi, sabai kura Day 2 ma aayera thamncha, jaha Top 16 teams afno sabai shakti diyera euta matra lakshya ko lagi ladchan: South Asia ko champion banna.

Pratyek match, pratyek elimination, ra pratyek rotation le yo teams ko bhagya nirdharit garnecha. Yo bela second chance chaina – euta matra team sabai bhanda mathi uthnecha ra title claim garnecha.

Top 3 teams PMGO ma qualify hunechan.

Match Schedule
Finals: 2 Days | 16 – 17 April
Time: From 17:50 (GMT +5:45) Daily onwards

Finalist Teams:
Hidden Leaf Esports
Abrupt Slayers
NEPX ESPORTS

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

Connect with #StreetFighterMovie online:
Website: https://www.streetfightermovie.com/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/streetfightermovie/
X: https://x.com/Street_fighter
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/StreetfighterMovie/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@streetfightermovie
Threads: https://www.threads.com/@streetfightermovie

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

साथ ही, मेरा नवीनतम एल्बम 'मिलिट्री माइंडसेट' देखना न भूलें:

snippet.title: KITAB (Official Music video) | Mr Dutt ft Vipin Foji | Tanu Rawat | New Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened.  join Mr Dutt  for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song KITAB
MAKE YOUR REELS : https://url-shortener.me/I440


Listen on : 
Spotify : https://url-shortener.me/I43P



AUDIO CREDITS:
SONG : KITAB 
SINGER : MR DUTT FT VIPIN FOJI
LYRICS & COMPOSE : VARUN GARHWALA , MR DUTT
MUSIC & MISX MASTER : MR DUTT

 FEMALE LEAD : TANU RAWAT 
REEL PROMOTIONS: SHARP MEDIA

YT Promotion - BIGMedia 

Director - Teji Sandhu
Cheif Ad - Sourav Dheer
1st Ad - Jass
Editor - cutsbynav
Colorist - Fateh Sidhu
Vfx - Gags 3D
Female lead - Tanu Rawat
Production Head = Kainth Production (Gagan)
Production ad = Ravi Birla
Himachal production- Sunny 
Makeup = Komal Makeover
Hair = Sunny Lakhanpal
Still = J singh
Spot Team - Ram and Team

Tanu Rawat Team 
Anjali Rawat and Team

Transport - Nijjar Group
Art - Karma 
Costume - Rajat Manchanda
Costume Ad - Neha and Fahem

lyrics : 
Tane Mai Likhu Rani Dil Ki 
Ya Tane Mumtaj Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai beth Gya Tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Re Hottha Na Gulab Likh Diyu 
Re Akhya Ne Sharab Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga
Chunni Mai Jo Moti Jadre Usne Chhori Tara Likhu 
Chand Fika Lagge Se Yo Rup Kitna Pyara Lilkhu 
Ram Ka ishara Likhu Dekhya Na Nazara Likhhu Bat Chhoti Lage Meri Kaat Ke dubara Likkhu 
Re Battan Ne Alap Likhunga 
Jo dikhja Tu Khaab Likhunga 
Je likhne Mai Beth Gya tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 

Ho Pucche na Tu Mere Te Ya Ashiq ka Haal Resham Te Jyada Hai Sunehre Tere Baal 
Ho Pariya Ke desh Te Tu Aayi Vissa Dalke 
Red Moon Jisi E Tu lage Se Kamal 
Can’t lu Without You You Baby Mine 
If You Touch Me So am Feeling Fine 
Likhu Tere Bare Saari Duniya Ke Bol Laau 
Likhu Tere Bare Sari Duniya Ne Bhul Jau 
Likkhu Tere Bare fir Kuch Or Na Mai Likh Pau 
Tod ke Kalam Fir Fanshi Pe Mai Jhul Jaau 

Tanne Mai Meri Radha Likh Diyu 
Maine Mai Ghanshyam Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To Pkka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Tanne Mai likhhu Rani Dil ki


#kitab #mrdutt

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth’s mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom’s influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel’s most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ▷ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn’t exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film’s genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank You So Much For Watching!
May the force be with us, Always!

de-DE.title: Avengers: Doomsday – Erster Trailer „Der letzte Donnergott“ | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
de-DE.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Seht euch den Fan-Trailer (Konzept) zu Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) an! (Mehr Infos zum Video weiter unten!)

Avengers: Doomsday markiert einen Wendepunkt im Marvel-Universum: Eine neue globale und multiversale Krise zwingt die mächtigsten Helden der Erde in ihren bisher gefährlichsten Kampf. Die Realität selbst beginnt zu zerbrechen, und mit dem Auftauchen von Doctor Doom entsteht eine Bedrohung, die von Intelligenz, Präzision und absolutem Ehrgeiz geprägt ist. Der Trailer schlägt einen düsteren Ton an und zeigt Zerstörung im großen Stil, zusammenbrechende Welten und Helden, die in einer zunehmend instabilen Welt um die Kontrolle kämpfen. Neue und wiederkehrende Charaktere treffen aufeinander, und der Grat zwischen Überleben und Niederlage wird dünner denn je.

Die Geschichte erkundet eine Zukunft, in der Macht allein nicht mehr ausreicht, um das Kommende aufzuhalten, denn Dooms Einfluss breitet sich durch Strategie, Technologie und Manipulation über verschiedene Realitäten aus. Die Avengers müssen sich nicht nur einem mächtigen Feind stellen, sondern auch den Folgen eines Universums, das bereits am Rande seiner Kräfte ist. Allianzen werden auf die Probe gestellt, Führungsqualitäten herausgefordert, und jede Entscheidung hat weitreichende Konsequenzen, die über die Grenzen einer einzelnen Zeitlinie hinausgehen. Mit gewaltigen Actionsequenzen, emotionaler Wucht und großem Crossover-Potenzial zählt Avengers: Doomsday zu den ambitioniertesten Projekten von Marvel. Im Mittelpunkt stehen der Zusammenbruch, der Widerstand und der Kampf um die Zukunft des Multiversums.

Schnitt, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail von @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

hi.title: एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे - पहला ट्रेलर "द लास्ट थंडर गॉड" | क्रिस हेम्सवर्थ | 2026
hi.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

मार्वल स्टूडियोज़ की फिल्म 'एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे' (2026) का 'फैन (कॉन्सेप्ट) ट्रेलर' देखें (इस वीडियो के बारे में अधिक जानकारी नीचे दी गई है!)

'एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे' मार्वल ब्रह्मांड में एक बड़ा बदलाव लेकर आती है, जब एक नया वैश्विक और बहु-ब्रह्मांडीय संकट पृथ्वी के सबसे शक्तिशाली नायकों को अब तक की सबसे खतरनाक लड़ाई में धकेल देता है। वास्तविकता के टूटने के कगार पर पहुँचने के साथ ही, डॉक्टर डूम का उदय एक ऐसे खतरे को जन्म देता है जो बुद्धिमत्ता, सटीकता और असीम महत्वाकांक्षा से परिपूर्ण है। ट्रेलर एक भयावह माहौल बनाता है, जिसमें बड़े पैमाने पर विनाश, ढहती दुनियाएँ और नायकों को तेजी से अस्थिर होते वातावरण में नियंत्रण बनाए रखने के लिए संघर्ष करते हुए दिखाया गया है। जैसे-जैसे नए और पुराने किरदार एक साथ आते हैं, अस्तित्व और हार के बीच की रेखा पहले से कहीं अधिक पतली हो जाती है।

कहानी एक ऐसे भविष्य की पड़ताल करती है जहाँ अकेले शक्ति आने वाले खतरे को रोकने के लिए पर्याप्त नहीं हो सकती है, क्योंकि डूम का प्रभाव रणनीति, प्रौद्योगिकी और हेरफेर के माध्यम से कई वास्तविकताओं में फैलता है। एवेंजर्स को न केवल एक शक्तिशाली दुश्मन का सामना करना होगा, बल्कि एक ऐसे ब्रह्मांड के परिणामों से भी जूझना होगा जो पहले से ही अपनी चरम सीमा पर पहुँच चुका है। गठबंधनों की परीक्षा होती है, नेतृत्व को चुनौती मिलती है, और हर निर्णय का महत्व एक समयरेखा से कहीं अधिक होता है। ज़बरदस्त एक्शन दृश्यों, गहन भावनात्मक दांव-पेच और मजबूत क्रॉसओवर संभावनाओं के साथ, एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे मार्वल की सबसे महत्वाकांक्षी परियोजनाओं में से एक है, जो पतन, प्रतिरोध और बहुब्रह्मांड के भविष्य की रक्षा के संघर्ष पर केंद्रित है।

संपादन, वीएफएक्स, एसएफएक्स, थंबनेल: @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
मैं जिन सॉफ़्टवेयर का उपयोग करता हूँ: एडोब प्रीमियर, आफ्टर इफेक्ट्स, फोटोशॉप, एडोब ऑडिशन, अनरियल इंजन 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ हमारे चैनल पर, हम ट्रेलर मैशअप बनाते हैं ▷ ट्रेलर मैशअप, जिन्हें रिकट ट्रेलर भी कहा जाता है, एक या अधिक फिल्मों के विभिन्न फुटेज को इकट्ठा करके और उन्हें फिर से संपादित करके एक बिल्कुल नया ट्रेलर बनाने से तैयार किए जाते हैं। ये मैशअप अक्सर किसी ऐसी फिल्म को दर्शाते हैं जो अस्तित्व में नहीं है या किसी मौजूदा फिल्म की शैली को बदल देते हैं। संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका के कॉपीराइट अधिनियम 17 यू.एस.सी. § 101 के तहत परिभाषित व्युत्पन्न कार्यों के रूप में, इन्हें उचित उपयोग सिद्धांत के तहत कॉपीराइट दावों से सुरक्षा मिल सकती है।

ट्रेलर मैशअप न केवल उपयोगकर्ता-निर्मित डिजिटल रचनात्मकता का एक रूप हैं, बल्कि आगामी रिलीज़ के लिए उत्साह बढ़ाने का एक अनूठा तरीका भी हैं, जो आधिकारिक फिल्म ट्रेलरों के पूरक हैं। जहां पारंपरिक ट्रेलर कथानक का संकेत देते हैं और प्रचार उत्पन्न करते हैं, वहीं प्रशंसक-निर्मित मैशअप दर्शकों को मौजूदा फुटेज पर अपना सिनेमाई अंदाज़ जोड़ने की अनुमति देते हैं। यह रचनात्मक स्वतंत्रता किसी विशेष अभिनेता को उजागर कर सकती है, किसी विशिष्ट कहानी पर ज़ोर दे सकती है, या फिल्म की शैली को पूरी तरह से बदल भी सकती है।

यह वीडियो एक पैरोडी है। इसकी व्युत्पन्न और रूपांतरणात्मक प्रकृति के कारण, इसे उचित उपयोग के तहत संरक्षित किया गया है।

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
देखने के लिए बहुत-बहुत धन्यवाद!
शक्ति हमेशा हमारे साथ रहे!

pt-BR.title: Vingadores: Apocalipse - Primeiro trailer "O Último Deus do Trovão" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
pt-BR.description:
#Vingadores #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Assista ao trailer conceitual de fã para Vingadores: O Juízo Final (2026) da Marvel Studios (Mais informações sobre este vídeo abaixo!)

Vingadores: O Juízo Final marca uma grande escalada no universo Marvel, com uma nova crise global e multiversal forçando os heróis mais poderosos da Terra a enfrentarem sua batalha mais perigosa até então. Com a própria realidade começando a se fragmentar, o surgimento do Doutor Destino introduz uma ameaça definida por inteligência, precisão e ambição absoluta. O trailer estabelece um tom mais sombrio, mostrando destruição em larga escala, mundos em colapso e heróis lutando para manter o controle em um ambiente cada vez mais instável. À medida que personagens novos e antigos se unem, a linha entre a sobrevivência e a derrota se torna mais tênue do que nunca.

A história explora um futuro onde o poder por si só pode não ser suficiente para impedir o que está por vir, já que a influência de Destino se espalha por meio de estratégia, tecnologia e manipulação em múltiplas realidades. Os Vingadores precisam enfrentar não apenas um inimigo poderoso, mas também as consequências de um universo já levado ao limite. Alianças são testadas, lideranças são desafiadas e cada decisão tem um peso que transcende uma única linha do tempo. Com sequências de ação massivas, alto impacto emocional e grande potencial para crossovers, Vingadores: Apocalipse se destaca como um dos projetos mais ambiciosos da Marvel, centrado no colapso, na resistência e na luta para proteger o futuro do multiverso.

fr-FR.title: Avengers : Doomsday - Première bande-annonce « Le dernier dieu du tonnerre » | Chris Hemsworth | ...
fr-FR.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Découvrez le concept de bande-annonce (FAN) pour Avengers : Doomsday (2026) des studios Marvel (Plus d'infos ci-dessous !)

Avengers : Doomsday marque un tournant majeur dans l'univers Marvel. Une nouvelle crise mondiale et multiverselle contraint les plus grands héros de la Terre à livrer leur combat le plus périlleux. Alors que la réalité elle-même commence à se fissurer, l'émergence du Docteur Fatalis introduit une menace caractérisée par l'intelligence, la précision et une ambition absolue. La bande-annonce installe une ambiance plus sombre, dévoilant des destructions à grande échelle, des mondes qui s'effondrent et des héros qui luttent pour garder le contrôle dans un environnement de plus en plus instable. Tandis que de nouveaux personnages et des héros de retour se rassemblent, la frontière entre la survie et la défaite est plus ténue que jamais.

L'histoire explore un futur où la force brute ne suffira peut-être pas à arrêter le cataclysme, car l'influence de Fatalis s'étend par la stratégie, la technologie et la manipulation à travers de multiples réalités. Les Avengers doivent affronter non seulement un ennemi redoutable, mais aussi les conséquences d'un univers déjà poussé à ses limites. Les alliances sont mises à l'épreuve, le leadership contesté, et chaque décision a des répercussions bien au-delà d'une simple ligne temporelle. Avec des scènes d'action spectaculaires, une forte charge émotionnelle et un potentiel de crossover important, Avengers : Doomsday s'impose comme l'un des projets les plus ambitieux de Marvel, centré sur l'effondrement, la résistance et la lutte pour protéger l'avenir du multivers.

Montage, effets spéciaux, effets sonores, miniature par @GalacticTrailerOfficial

Ces mashups mettent souvent en scène un film inexistant ou transforment le genre d'un film existant. En tant qu'œuvres dérivées, telles que définies par la loi américaine sur le droit d'auteur (17 U.S.C. § 101), elles peuvent être protégées contre les réclamations pour atteinte aux droits d'auteur grâce à la doctrine de l'utilisation équitable (fair use).

Les mashups de bandes-annonces ne sont pas seulement une forme de créativité numérique générée par les utilisateurs, mais aussi un moyen original de susciter l'enthousiasme autour des sorties à venir, en complément des bandes-annonces officielles. Tandis que les bandes-annonces traditionnelles dévoilent l'intrigue et créent le buzz, les mashups réalisés par les fans permettent au public d'apporter sa propre touche cinématographique aux images existantes. Cette liberté créative peut mettre en avant un acteur en particulier, souligner une intrigue spécifique, ou même transformer complètement le genre du film.

Cette vidéo est une parodie. De par sa nature dérivée et transformative, elle est protégée par l'utilisation équitable (fair use).

id.title: Avengers: Doomsday - Trailer Pertama "Dewa Petir Terakhir" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
id.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Tonton 'Konsep Trailer Fan' untuk Avengers: Doomsday (2026) dari Marvel Studios (Informasi Lebih Lanjut Tentang Video Ini di Bawah!)

Avengers: Doomsday menandai peningkatan besar di alam semesta Marvel saat krisis global dan multiversal baru memaksa para pahlawan terkuat Bumi ke dalam pertempuran paling berbahaya mereka. Dengan realitas itu sendiri yang mulai retak, munculnya Doctor Doom memperkenalkan ancaman yang didefinisikan oleh kecerdasan, ketelitian, dan ambisi absolut. Trailer ini menampilkan nuansa yang lebih gelap, memperlihatkan kehancuran skala besar, dunia yang runtuh, dan para pahlawan yang berjuang untuk mempertahankan kendali dalam lingkungan yang semakin tidak stabil. Saat karakter baru dan lama berkumpul, garis antara bertahan hidup dan kekalahan menjadi lebih tipis dari sebelumnya.

Kisah ini mengeksplorasi masa depan di mana kekuatan saja mungkin tidak cukup untuk menghentikan apa yang akan datang, karena pengaruh Doom menyebar melalui strategi, teknologi, dan manipulasi di berbagai realitas. Avengers harus menghadapi bukan hanya musuh yang kuat, tetapi juga konsekuensi dari alam semesta yang sudah mencapai batasnya. Aliansi diuji, kepemimpinan ditantang, dan setiap keputusan memiliki bobot yang melampaui satu garis waktu. Dengan rangkaian aksi besar-besaran, taruhan emosional yang tinggi, dan potensi crossover yang kuat, Avengers: Doomsday berdiri sebagai salah satu proyek Marvel yang paling ambisius, berpusat pada keruntuhan, perlawanan, dan perjuangan untuk melindungi masa depan multiverse.

Mashup ini sering menggambarkan film yang tidak ada atau mengubah genre film yang sudah ada. Sebagai karya turunan yang didefinisikan berdasarkan Undang-Undang Hak Cipta Amerika Serikat 17 U.S.C. § 101, karya-karya ini dapat dilindungi dari klaim hak cipta berdasarkan doktrin penggunaan wajar.

Mashup trailer bukan hanya bentuk kreativitas digital yang dihasilkan pengguna, tetapi juga cara unik untuk membangun antusiasme terhadap rilis mendatang, melengkapi trailer film resmi. Sementara trailer tradisional menggoda plot dan menghasilkan hype, mashup buatan penggemar memungkinkan penonton untuk memberikan sentuhan sinematik mereka sendiri pada cuplikan yang sudah ada. Kebebasan kreatif ini dapat menyoroti aktor tertentu, menekankan alur cerita tertentu, atau bahkan mengubah genre film sepenuhnya.

it.title: Avengers: Doomsday - Primo trailer "L'ultimo dio del tuono" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
it.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Guarda il 'Concept del trailer dei fan' per Avengers: Doomsday (2026) dei Marvel Studios (Maggiori informazioni su questo video qui sotto!)

Avengers: Doomsday segna una svolta decisiva nell'universo Marvel, con una nuova crisi globale e multiversale che costringe i più potenti eroi della Terra ad affrontare la battaglia più pericolosa di sempre. Con la realtà stessa che inizia a frammentarsi, l'emergere del Dottor Destino introduce una minaccia definita da intelligenza, precisione e ambizione assoluta. Il trailer adotta un tono più cupo, mostrando distruzione su vasta scala, mondi che collassano ed eroi che lottano per mantenere il controllo in un ambiente sempre più instabile. Mentre personaggi nuovi e di ritorno si uniscono, il confine tra sopravvivenza e sconfitta si fa più sottile che mai.

La storia esplora un futuro in cui il solo potere potrebbe non bastare a fermare ciò che sta arrivando, poiché l'influenza di Destino si diffonde attraverso strategia, tecnologia e manipolazione in molteplici realtà. Gli Avengers devono affrontare non solo un nemico potente, ma anche le conseguenze di un universo già spinto al limite. Le alleanze vengono messe alla prova, la leadership è sfidata e ogni decisione ha un peso che va ben oltre una singola linea temporale. Con sequenze d'azione spettacolari, una forte carica emotiva e un grande potenziale di crossover, Avengers: Doomsday si conferma come uno dei progetti più ambiziosi della Marvel, incentrato sul collasso, la resistenza e la lotta per proteggere il futuro del multiverso.

Montaggio, effetti visivi, effetti sonori, miniatura a cura di @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software che utilizzo: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Sul nostro canale creiamo mashup di trailer ▷ I mashup di trailer, noti anche come trailer rimontati, sono realizzati raccogliendo diverse sequenze video da uno o più film e rimontandole per creare un trailer completamente nuovo. Questi mashup spesso raffigurano un film inesistente o ne modificano il genere. Essendo opere derivate, come definite dalla legge statunitense sul diritto d'autore (17 U.S.C. § 101), possono essere protetti da rivendicazioni di copyright in base alla dottrina del "fair use" (uso lecito).

I mashup di trailer non sono solo una forma di creatività digitale generata dagli utenti, ma anche un modo unico per creare attesa per le prossime uscite, integrando i trailer ufficiali. Mentre i trailer tradizionali anticipano la trama e generano clamore, i mashup realizzati dai fan permettono al pubblico di dare la propria interpretazione cinematografica al materiale esistente. Questa libertà creativa può mettere in risalto un particolare attore, enfatizzare una specifica trama o persino trasformare completamente il genere del film.

Questo video è una parodia. Data la sua natura derivata e trasformativa, è protetto dal "fair use".

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Grazie mille per la visione!
Che la Forza sia con noi, sempre!

en.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
en.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth’s mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom’s influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel’s most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ▷ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn’t exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film’s genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank You So Much For Watching!
May the force be with us, Always!

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] WU อู #WUTheSeries
snippet.description:
พีท (นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์) ชายหนุ่มผู้อับโชคซึ่งมีเศษวิญญาณปีศาจอยู่ในตัว ทำให้สัมผัสได้ถึง เหยาพลังงานประหลาดที่ออกมากลืนกินพลังชีวิตของผู้คน จึงได้พบกับ นิรันดร์ (สกาย วงศ์รวี) ชายหนุ่มที่นำพาให้เขาเข้าไปในโลกแห่ง “อู” ทั้งสองได้กลายเป็นคู่หูจำเป็นและได้รวบรวมทีมเพื่อร่วมกันปราบเหยาและปัดเป่าสิ่งชั่วร้าย!
 
 นิรันดร์ พีท และทีมปราบปีศาจจะร่วมมือกันผ่านพ้นอุปสรรคได้ไหม และความสัมพันธ์ของทั้งคู่จะผูกพันกันด้วยจิตวิญญาณได้อย่างไร ติดตามได้ใน “WU อู” ทุกวันอังคาร เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 รับชมย้อนหลังที่แรกได้ที่ VIU เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 5 พฤษภาคมนี้

snippet.title: Bangles (Official #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | बांगडी
snippet.description:
|| 🕉 || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Singer - Sanju Rathod
Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod
Music Produced By - G-Spark

Additional Mix Mastered By - Rupendar Venkatesh @mixmagic Studios

snippet.title: Manai Man Ma | मनै मनमा | New Nepali DJ Dancing Song | Aagyat | Official Music Video |
snippet.description:
Aagyat Presents: New Nepali Dj Dancing Song

#manaimanma #nepalisong #nepalimusic #nepalidancingsong #nepalidjremixsong #nepalidj #nepalidjsong #nepalifilmsong #officialsong #nepalilokgeet #nepaliviralsong #nepaligeet #newtrendingsong

#NepaliCouple #DJRemix #MusicVideo #OfficialMusicVideo

#newsong

Lyrics:

Manai manma…
Manai manma…

Ya ta tuna layeu ki…
Ya ta manko chabi choryeu timile…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Timile mero mutu choyau chupchap
Manai manma… manai manma…
Maya basyo… thahai nabhai

Manai manma socheko kurani
Jhattai thaha pauchau ho kasari
Bhana timile… bhana timile
Ya ta tuna layau ki
Ya ta manko chabi choryeu timile

Hey… Hey…
Hands up…
Manai manma…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Body move gara… side to side
Manai manma… manai manma…

Uff furti her
Lau her furti her
Timi jasto hajarau pachi chan
Furti nadekhau
Timile furti nadekhau
Nakkale ketale maya nabolau

Timi najik huda mutu dhadkincha
Malai pani kina yesto lagcha
Shayad yo nai maya ho…

Manai manma… manai manma…
Manai manma… manai manma…
Move your body nonstop
Ya ta tuna layau ki
Ya ta manko chabi choryau timile

Manai manma…
Manai manma…

Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs

I've been in love for a hundred years

Your beauty was a symbol

Your every beat is you

You are the flame, so remember

I too am a paradise

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

snippet.title: ST MAN - KALI KALI FT. YUNG 22 & BIG NORZZA ( OFFICAL MUSIC VIDEO )
snippet.description:
Nepal Hiphop Records Presents the official music video of Kali Kali by ST MAN featuring Yung 22 & Big Norzza.
Kali Kali is a fusion of a Hindi chorus, Nepali folk melodies, and new school rap.


Audio Credits :
➟ Performed By - St Man, Yung 22 & Big Norzza
➟ Music Produced By - St Man
➟ Background scoring - St Man
➟ Lyrics By - St Man, Yung 22 & Big Norzza
➟ Female singer - Somea Baraili
➟ Composed By - St Man & Yung 22
➟ Sarangi - Hemanta Kancha Rasaily
➟ Mix & Master By 8ugustus

Video Credits : Matte studio
➟ Director : Thomas GM 
➟ DOP : nexal thapa 
➟ Edit: thomas gm / nexal thapa
➟ 1st Assistant Camera : Pratik thapa
➟ color: thomas gm
➟ BTS : Arjun
➟ Lights  : Nabin bogati 
➟ Visual concept : ST MAN & Thomas GM
 
 
Project Management  :
 
➟ Artist and Project management: Knack Nepal
➟ Project Head: Niraj Baraili
➟ Production Manager : Shyam Dai 
➟ Flyer & design - Bipshon Design
➟ Stylist / Costume Designer : Tsabinz
➟ Makeup & Hair : Sangita Tamang, Annie Tamang 

Cast
➟ Actor: Ram Chandra Adhikari Aka Gokte Kaji
➟ Model :  Sharon Lepcha Bajracharya & Smriti Tamang

Choreographed by Baigaicha Crew.


Special Thanks to
Yung 22, Big Norzza, BIg Man, Fumu, Carey dai, Sameer dai, Ashok Dai

Subscribe and click the bell icon to get notified.    / @stmanofficial  

Follow me on :
Instagram :   / https://www.instagram.com/stman.official?
Facebook :   /  https://www.facebook.com/share/1DoxDxiBBK/?

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2

Lai bari Lai 
Lai bari Lai 
Maya cha hai dil bhari nai 
Banai khayo dadelo le 
Manai Khayo timro maya le 


Hamro Bhetghat Pahilo Choti Ho ( lhasso )
Bhana Aja kahi katai Jane Ho ( lhasso )
Kusume Rumal Chino Laijau ( Saachai )
Yespali Lane Gari rachu Dai ma ta


Dada Kada Katera Ma sangai Jauna tmi 
Timro mana samma jane bato Dekhaideuna hai 
Maya Tarki farki jharki bhayeni Boli deuna hai

Khelna Deu 
Herna Deu 
Salkeko jawani Fakreko Maya maa Palkeko ma pani 
Cha maya cha katai 
Sirfula Siraima Laidium ki chhapakai


Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2



Mutu Dhak Dhak BP high Body maa Heat 
Chinta Nagara ma Gardimla thik
ausadhi lekhdya chu 7 din ko 
Khop lagai dinchu 7 inch ko 

Dr. St Man Bhaye Kina attina paryo 
Bihana ki diuso ki Rat dina paryo 
Dina maa 5 ki 7 ki 8 Dina paryo 
Vana Body ko kun Part jach dina paryo 

Big House Big Dream Big chain Big Thing 
Living Fast Chasing Dream Lifestyle mainstream 
Deko haina guff 
Maya vanda Badhi Garchau Business Talk 
She don't believe in love tara chaiyo mero love 
Yeah

Aare Aare Aare Aare 
Aare Apango 
Aale Aale Aale Aale 
Aale Apango 
Nga Mula Ela semri taa Mula Ngada Tha mula 
Maya La Mula Chyago 

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2


Janti boki aula 10 gate bihibar 
Gaubhari masu ra bhat 
Kodo Ko Raksi chyang Nigar Bidi cigar
K khane K piune afno bichar 
Malai daijo maa maya  chaiyo ajambari 
Meri Sakambari timlai samhali  rakchu rakam sari
Ful chari diula timro harek kadam pachi 
Siudo maa timro mang bharidinchu 
9 biga bari timro nam garidinchu 
9 mahina maa ghorle paune kam gardinchu
5 biga garib lai daan garidinchu 

Hooo Hooo Hooo 

Haa

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe


Fulaiko Fulbari maa 
fulai lw Sajaidiula 
Appa Ra Aame le Mane ta 
Aune Saal Bhagai diula 
Pardaina Aatina 
Bichaima Chaddina 
Tayar chu Sath dina 
Hapta ko Sath dina 
Lhassooooo

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2


Female 

Chadi malai Najau etai 
malai laijau timi sangai

snippet.title: Måneskin - Beggin' (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Måneskin - Beggin' (Lyrics)
Get:

Lyrics:

[Måneskin]
Put your loving hand out, baby
'Cause I'm beggin'

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
Ridin' high, when I was king
I played it hard and fast, 'cause I had everything
I walked away, you want me then
But easy come and easy go
And it would end

So, any time I need ya, let me go
Yah, any time I feed you, get me? No
Any time I see you, let me know
But I planted that seed, just let me grow
I'm on my knees while I'm beggin'
'Cause I don't want to lose you
Hey yeah, ratatata

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
And put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
And put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
I need you to understand
Tried so hard to be your man
The kind of man you want in the end
Only then can I begin to live again

An empty shell
I used to be
The shadow of my life
Was hangin over me
A broken man
But I don't know
Won't even stand the devil's dance
To win my soul

[Måneskin]
What we doin'? What we chasin'?
What about 'em, why the basement?
Why we got good shit, don't embrace it?
Why the feel for the need to replace me?
You on a runway track from the good
I want to paint in the pictures any way we could, react
Like the heart in a trash where you should
You done gave it away, ya' had it till you took it back
But I keep walkin' on
Keep rockin' dawns
Keep walking forward
Now the court is yours
Keep browsin' halls
'Cause I don't wanna live in a broken home
Girl I'm beggin'

[Måneskin]
Mhh ye-e-e-ah
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
I'm fightin' hard
To hold my own
Just can't make it all alone
I'm holdin' on
I can't fall back
I'm just a con about to fade to black

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
Put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out darlin'

[Måneskin]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out

Yah any time I feed you get me? No,
Any time I see you let me know,

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

✖ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

✖ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

🎤  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.title: "Malai Hera" Sabin Rai & The Pharaoh
snippet.description:
“Malai Hera” is a gentle love song where a single glance holds a thousand unspoken feelings and hearts speak in silence.

Sabin Rai & The Pharaoh are:

Sabin Rai 
Binod Lama Tamang
Jeevan Lama
John Shrestha

Audio engineers
Stephen Tamang
Subash Gurung

Crew 
Jitesh Shakya
Nara Bahadur Khatri
Samir Shrestha

Mix and Master by Stephen tamang
Recording Studio : Fuzz_studio_nepal.
Keyboard sessions: Anup sunar ( Rahar music Creations )
Back vocals : Anup sunara, Aashis Rokka.

Video credit :

VIDEO DIRECTOR : ABHI SAMPANG RAI
CAST: NEELAM RAI. AKASH SUHANG LIMBU. AAYUS RAI
DOP: BIKESH MAGAR. ASSIST DIR: ARSHU SHRESTHA. CINEMATOGRAPHY: KIWA KHIMDUNG RAI.

EDIT: BIKESH MAGAR. SANTOSH SHAH THAKURI. coLor: BIKESH MAGAR.

snippet.title: French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee
snippet.description:
French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee: Song from Coachella 2026

Check Out the Coachella 2026 Rap/Hip-Hop, R&B Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg2x_V0qn2yoXAThIirv3AHI_R5Ngazct

⭐Follow Afterglow:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
Spotify: https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
🔴 Picture : https://lexica.art/ 

⭐French Montana:
https://www.instagram.com/frenchmontana/

Lyrics:

[Pre-Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
It's not gonna work for you
Nobody can equal me (I know)
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm fucked up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peeped you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A fucking good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink, but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

[Verse 1: French Montana]
Feelin' like I'm fresh out, Boosie (Boosie)
If they want the drama, got the Uzi (Uzi)
Ship the whole crew to the cruise ship (Cruise)
Doin' shit you don't even see in movies (Movies)
Ride with me, ride with me, boss (Boss)
I got a hard head, but her ass soft (Soft)
She want the last name with the ring on it
'Cause I pulled out a million cash, told her plank on it (Skrrt)

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi (Ow)

[Pre-Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm fucked up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peeped you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A fucking good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink, but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do (Oh)
[Verse 2: French Montana]
You ain't enough for me
Too much for you, alone
Baby, go and grab some bad bitches, bring 'em home
Know the jet's on me
I'ma curve my best for you, you know
So pick up that dress for me
Leave the rest on
Too much convo for 24 hours
When you stand next to me, 24 karats
She left her man at home
She don't love him no more
I want your mind and your body
Don't mind nobody
So, you don't ever hurt nobody
Baby girl, work your body, work your body

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose (Ooh)
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi
Why not?

[Outro: Swae Lee]
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

Contact: afterglow.musicrecord@gmail.com

If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry

Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too

[Verse 2: French Montana]

Too much for you, alone
Baby, go and grab some bad bitches, bring 'em home
Know the jet's on me
I'ma curve my best for you, you know
So pick up that dress for me

Too much convo for 24 hours

I want your mind and your body
Don't mind nobody
So, you don't ever hurt nobody
Baby girl, work your body, work your body

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose (Ooh)
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi
Why not?

[Outro: Swae Lee]
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

de-DE.title: Olivia Rodrigo - drop dead (Offizielles Musikvideo)
de-DE.description:
„drop dead“ ist jetzt erhältlich: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/dropdead

„you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love“ erscheint am 12. Juni und kann jetzt vorbestellt werden: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Die Kollektion shoppen: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Regie: Petra Collins
Drehort: Schloss Versailles

Folge Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq

Folge dem Schloss Versailles:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chateauversailles/
Twitter: https://x.com/CVersailles
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@chateauversailles
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/chateauversailles
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/chateauversailles

Liedtext

Ich weiß, die Bar schließt um 23 Uhr.
Ich hoffe, du trinkst dein Bier nie aus.
Du kennst den Text von „Just Like Heaven“ auswendig.
Und ich weiß, warum er ihn geschrieben hat.
Jetzt, wo du direkt vor mir stehst.

Ohh.
Eines Nachts langweilte ich mich im Bett.
Und habe dich im Internet gestalkt.
Es ist weibliche Intuition.
Denn ich hatte immer die Vision, wie wir so dastehen.
Gedrängt in der Schlange vor dem Badezimmer.
Du siehst aus wie ein Engel an den Wänden von Versailles
So lebendig habe ich mich noch nie gefühlt
Aber küss mich und ich falle tot um

Und mir ist so übel
Linker Haken, rechter Schlag in den Magen
Du bist so ein hübscher Junge
Ich bin paranoid, dass ich dich mir nur eingebildet habe
Ja, ich würde mich freuen, wenn du mich nach Hause begleiten würdest
Wenn du mir versprichst, dass wir ganz langsam gehen können
Denn ich habe Kaugummi
Und noch so vieles, was ich gerne wissen würde
Warst du zum Beispiel schon mal in Japan?
Oder bist du schon mal mit dem Eurostar nach Frankreich gefahren?

Ich hab dir die ganze Nacht Andeutungen gemacht
Dass ich es lieben würde, wenn du meine Hand halten würdest, verdammt nochmal
Und dann könnten wir vielleicht rummachen
Kleider aus und zu Boden fallen
Lass uns zusammen sein
Lass uns ausgehen
Und der ganzen Welt erzählen, wie

Eines Nachts langweilte ich mich im Bett
Und hab dich im Internet gestalkt
Es ist weibliche Intuition
Denn ich hatte immer die Vision, wie wir so dastehen
Gedrängt in der Schlange vor dem Badezimmer

Pré-enregistrez « You Seen Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love », disponible le 12 juin : https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove

Découvrez la collection : https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Réalisé par Petra Collins

Tourné au Château de Versailles

Suivez Olivia Rodrigo :

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter : https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok : https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
Discord : https://discord.com/invite/livieshq

Suivez le Château de Versailles :

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/chateauversailles/
Twitter : https://x.com/CVersailles
TikTok : https://www.tiktok.com/@chateauversailles
YouTube : https://www.youtube.com/chateauversailles
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/chateauversailles

Paroles

Je sais que le bar ferme à 23 h

J’espère que tu ne finiras jamais cette bière

Tu connais toutes les paroles de « Just Like Heaven »

Et je sais pourquoi il les a écrites

Maintenant que tu es là, juste devant moi

Ohh

Un soir, je m’ennuyais au lit

Et je t’ai stalké sur internet

C’est l’intuition féminine

Parce que j’ai toujours eu l’image de nous deux comme ça

Serrés dans la file d’attente des toilettes

Tu ressembles à un ange sur les murs de Versailles

La plus vivante J'y suis déjà allée

Mais embrasse-moi et je risque de mourir

Et j'ai l'impression que je vais vomir

Coup de poing gauche, coup de poing droit dans le ventre

T'es vraiment trop beau garçon

Je suis paranoïaque, je me demande si je t'ai inventé
Ouais, j'adorerais que tu me raccompagnes
Si tu promettais qu'on y aille doucement

Parce que j'ai du chewing-gum

Et plein de choses que j'aimerais savoir

Par exemple, t'es déjà allé au Japon ?

Ou tu as pris l'Eurostar pour la France ? J'ai semé des allusions toute la nuit

Que j'adorerais que tu me tiennes la main, putain

Et puis peut-être qu'on pourrait s'embrasser passionnément

Se déshabiller et tomber par terre

Allons-y, soyons sérieux

Sortons

Et racontons à la terre entière comment

Un soir, je m'ennuyais au lit

Et je t'ai stalké sur internet

C'est l'intuition féminine

Parce que j'ai toujours eu l'image de nous deux debout comme ça

Tout serrés dans la file d'attente de la salle de bain

Tu ressembles à un ange sur les murs de Versailles
Je ne me suis jamais sentie aussi vivante

Mais embrasse-moi et je pourrais bien

Poissons et Gémeaux

Mais je pense qu'on pourrait vraiment bien s'entendre

Si tu me laisses rester cette nuit

Eh bien, je pense que je pourrais bien rester pour toujours

Poissons et Gémeaux

Mais je pense qu'on pourrait vraiment bien s'entendre

Si tu me laisses rester cette nuit

Eh bien, je pense que je pourrais bien rester pour toujours

Ohh
Un soir, je m'ennuyais au lit

Et je t'ai stalké sur le Internet

C'est l'intuition féminine

Parce que j'ai toujours eu l'image de nous deux comme ça
Toutes serrées dans la file d'attente des toilettes

Tu ressembles à un ange sur les murs de Versailles
Je ne me suis jamais sentie aussi vivante

Mais embrasse-moi et je pourrais
Embrasse-moi et je pourrais
Embrasse-moi et je pourrais mourir

#OliviaRodrigo #dropdead #youseemprettysadforagirlsoinlove

Clip vidéo d'Olivia Rodrigo interprétant « drop dead ». © 2026 Olivia Rodrigo, sous licence exclusive de Geffen Records

it.title: Olivia Rodrigo - Drop Dead (Video musicale ufficiale)
it.description:
"drop dead" è ora disponibile: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/dropdead

Pre-salva "you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love", in uscita il 12 giugno: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Acquista la collezione: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Regia di Petra Collins
Girato nella Reggia di Versailles

Segui Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
Discord: Italiano: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq

Segui Palace of Versailles:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chateauversailles/
Twitter: https://x.com/CVersailles
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@chateauversailles
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/chateauversailles
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/chateauversailles

Testo

So che il bar chiude alle 23:00
Spero che tu non finisca mai quella birra
Conosci tutte le parole di "Just Like Heaven"
E so perché le ha scritte
Ora che sei proprio qui

Ohh
Una notte ero annoiato a letto
E ti ho spiato su internet
È intuizione femminile
Perché ho sempre avuto una visione di noi due così
Tutti stretti in fila per il bagno
Sembri un angelo sulle pareti di Versailles
Non mi sono mai sentita così viva
Ma baciami e potrei morire all'istante

E mi sento come se stessi per vomitare
Un gancio sinistro, un pugno destro allo stomaco
Sei così, così carino, ragazzo
Ho il sospetto di essermi inventata tutto
Sì, mi piacerebbe molto se mi accompagnassi a casa
Se mi promettessi che andremmo molto piano
Perché ho una gomma da masticare
E un sacco di cose che vorrei sapere
Tipo, sei mai stato in Giappone?

O hai mai preso l'Eurostar per la Francia?

Ho lanciato frecciatine tutta la notte
Che mi piacerebbe tanto se mi tenessi la mano, dannazione
E poi magari potremmo fare l'amore
Spogliarci e cadere a terra
Mettiamoci insieme
Usciamo
E raccontiamolo a tutto il mondo

Una notte ero annoiata a letto
E ti ho spiata su internet
È intuizione femminile
Perché ho sempre avuto una visione di noi due così
Tutti stretti in fila per il bagno
Sembri un angelo sulle mura di Versailles
Il momento più vivo che abbia mai vissuto
Ma baciami e potrei

Pesci e Gemelli
Ma penso che potremmo stare davvero bene insieme
Se mi lasciassi restare per la notte
Beh, penso che potrei dover restare per sempre

Pesci e Gemelli
Ma penso che potremmo stare davvero bene insieme
Se mi lasciassi restare per la notte
Beh, penso che potrei dover restare per sempre

Ohh
Una notte ero annoiata a letto
E ti ho spiata su internet Internet
È intuizione femminile
Perché ho sempre avuto una visione di noi due così, in piedi, ammassate in fila per il bagno
Sembri un angelo sulle mura di Versailles
Non mi sono mai sentita così viva
Ma baciami e potrei
Baciami e potrei
Baciami e potrei morire

#OliviaRodrigo #morti #sembridavverotristeperunaragazzainnamorata

snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 🏹
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

Filmed for IMAX

snippet.title: Kaavish - Intezaar
snippet.description:
Artist : Kaavish
Song : Intezaar

MUSIC
Lyrics : Jaffer Zaidi 
Bass : Waleed Attique

VIDEO
Director & Editor : Imam
Producer : Ovais Suhail 
Cinematographer : Babar Dahr
Art Director: Yamina Peerzada 
Focus Puller : Shakeel Shaukat 
Camera : Kap Camera Rental 
Lights & Crew : Popa Lights
Production Assistants : Muhammad Latif, Muhammad Aamir

Production Management : Alena Peerzada 
Artist management : Adil Awan

Lyrics:

تیرے انتظار میں
آشِیاں سجاؤں گا
ہوگا یہ مِلن کبھی
خود کو یہ بتاؤں گا

تیرے ہی وِصال سے
دل سکون پائے گا

درد انتظار کا
کیا، کِسے بتاؤں گا

ہو کے تیرے رُوبرو 
حالِ دل سناؤں گا

تب تلک یہ دل تیری
یاد میں ہی گائے گا

تیرے انتظار میں 

بے وجہ سے جیون میں
جینے کی وجہ تو ہے
سُونے سُونے آنگن میں
پیار کی ہَوا تو ہے
تیرے بِنا 
مر جاؤں نہ میں

تیرے انتظار میں 

یہ آگ یوں جَلتی رہے
یہ دل میرا، مجھ سے یہ کہے
کہ میں جَل جاؤں، پاؤں 
پیار، جو ہو نہ فنا

میں جَل جاؤں، پاؤں 
پیار، جو ہو نہ فنا

Fall in love with the soulful melody of Raanjhana Ve, beautifully sung by Antara Mitra and Soham Naik. This romantic Hindi song captures the essence of love, emotions, and heartfelt connection.

Enjoy the song in a high-quality lyrical video, perfect for singing along and immersing yourself in its soothing vibe.

#pawansingh #khushikakkar #khushitiwari #sadiyaaejaan #pawansinghnewsong #pawansinghnewvideo #bhojpurivideo #bhojpurisong2026 #newbhojpurivideo2026 #newbhojpurisong2026 

Lyrics
F - सुघर शरीर के सजावट बलम देखी शरीर के बनावट बलम
रउआ ला प्यार बाटे सोरह आना रति भर नइखे मिलावट बलम  
M देखला प गजबे मज़ा मिलेला ए जान 
की हे..
कमर पर करिया सड़िया खिलेला ए जान.....

M - काहे हमारा के अइसे तु देखेलू धन कनखी से 
गोरे गाली प लेवेद चुम्मा सनम तनकी से 
F - दिने में गुड नाइट क देब 
महंग इनभाईट क देब 
M - चलला प दहिने बावे हिलेला ए जान
की हे..
कमर पर करिया सड़िया खिलेला ए जान.....

M - हवे सूती से ए धनी ज्यादा स्वाद सटने में 
काला साड़ी के कहबू त 
क देब दुकान हम पटने में 
F - पहिर लेनी काटन बलम जी 
करी ना उद्घाटन बलम जी 
M आशु प्रियांशु कुर्ती सिलेला ए जान 
की हे..
कमर पर करिया सड़िया खिलेला ए जान.....

snippet.title: Sia - Cheap Thrills ft. Sean Paul 🌟 (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Cheap Thrills by Sia featuring Sean Paul is an upbeat anthem about having fun without needing money or luxury. 🎶💃 The song celebrates dancing, freedom, and enjoying the moment with friends. Its catchy rhythm and joyful energy make it all about good vibes and living in the now. 🌟🕺

🔔 Turn on notifications to find out about upcoming videos!

⏬ Digital Platforms:
🚀"Sia - Cheap Thrills ft. Sean Paul": https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/2ONIJ40u0Attbm3miIIpNO

📸Follow Sia:
▶ YouTube: @sia 
▶ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/siamusic/?hl=es-la
▶ Twitter: https://x.com/Sia
▶ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/siamusic/?locale=es_LA
▶ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sia

📸Follow Octava:
▶Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fededlyrics/
🎵 Follow the official Octava playlist on Spotify: https://spti.fi/octava

──────────────────────────────

🎤Lyrics: Sia - Cheap Thrills ft. Sean Paul

[Intro: Sean Paul]
Up with it girl
Rock with it girl
Show dem it girl (Bada bang bang)
Bounce with it girl
Dance with it girl
Get with it girl (Bada bang bang)

[Verse 1: Sia]
Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Friday night and I won't be long
Gotta do my hair, I put my make up on
It's Friday night and I won't be long

[Pre-Chorus: Sia (Sean Paul)]
Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
Hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
I got all I need
No, I ain't got cash, I ain't got cash
But I got you baby
(Just you an me)

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Verse 2: Sia]
Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Saturday and I won't be long
Gotta paint my nails, put my high heels on
It's Saturday and I won't be long

[Pre-Chorus: Sia (Sean Paul)]
Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
Hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
I got all I need (Sia)
No, I ain't got cash, I ain't got cash
But I got you baby
(Just you an me)

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Verse 3: Sean Paul & (Sia)]
Me an you, girl, you an me
Drop it to di floor an mek mi see your energy because
Mi nah play nuh hide an seek
Wah fi see di ting you have weg mek me feel weak girl (Free)
'Cause anytime you wine an kotch it
Di selector pull it up an put it pon repeat, girl
I'm nah touch a dollar in mi pocket
'Cause nuttn' in this world ain't more dan what you worth (I love cheap thrills!)

[Bridge: Sia & Sean Paul]
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control
Oh, oh

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Outro: Sia]
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)

Lyrics: back to friends - sombr (Lyrics/Letra)

[Verse 1]
Touch my body tender
'Cause the feeling makes me weak
Kicking off the covers
I see the ceiling while you're looking down at me

[Chorus]
How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed?
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Verse 2]
It was last December
You were layin' on my chest
I still remember
I was scared to take a breath
Didn't want you to movе your head

[Chorus]
How can we go back to being friеnds
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Bridge]
The devil in your eyes
Won't deny the lies you've sold
I'm holding on too tight
While you let go
This is casual

[Chorus]
How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?
How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Outro]
I'm someone you've never met (Yeah)

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Zaalima | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Love Song
snippet.description:
Song - Zaalima
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: China - Gate (1998) : Chamma Chamma Baaje Re | Alka Yagnik | Shankar Mahadevan | Vinod Rathod
snippet.description:
China - Gate (1998) : Chamma Chamma Baaje Re | Alka Yagnik | Shankar Mahadevan | Vinod Rathod 


Song Credits:
Song: Chamma Chamma Baaje Re 
Movie: China - Gate (1998) 
Singer(s): Alka Yagnik, Shankar Mahadevan, Vinod Rathod
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Rajkumar Santoshi
Director: Rajkumar Santoshi
Cast: Om Puri, Danny Denzongpa, Amrish Puri

Song Lyrics:

Dekha Dekhee Dil Meraa Jud Gaya Re
Leke Pardesi Dil Ud Gaya Re
Dekha Dekhee Dil Meraa Jud Gaya Re
Leke Pardesi Dil Ud Gaya Re

Chhamma Chhamma Ae Chhamma Chhamma
Chhamma Chhamma Baje Re Meree Paejaniya
Chhamma Chhamma Baje Re Meree Paejaniya
Tere Pas Aau Teree Sanson Me Samau Raja
Tere Pas Aau Teree Sanson Me Samau Raja
Teree Ninde Churalu

Chhamma Chhamma Ae Chhamma Chhamma
Chhamma Chhamma Baje Re Meree Paejaniya
Tere Pas Aau Teree Sanson Me Samau Raja
Tere Pas Aau Teree Sanson Me Samau Raja
Teree Ninde Churalu

Dekha Dekhee Dil Meraa Jud Gaya Re
Leke Pardesi Dil Ud Gaya Re

Yeh Meraa Lehenga Bada Hai MehengaIse Naa Hath Laga
Dila Du Bangala Dila Du GadiDivani Sath Toh Aa
Dila Du Bangala Dila Du Gadi Divani Sath Toh Aa
Meree Balee Hai Umar Mujhe Lagta Hai Dar
Meree Balee Hai Umar Mujhe Lagta Hai Dar
Naa Kar Beimanee
Chhamma Chhamma Baje Re Teree Paejaniya
Chhamma Chhamma Ae Chhamma Chhamma
Dekha Dekhee Dil Meraa Jud Gaya Re
Leke Pardesi Dil Ud Gaya Re

Hila Du Up Hila Du MpJo Maaru Mai Thumaka
Tere Thumke Pe Ha Bumbai PatnaMai Haru Calcutta
Tere Thumke Pe Ha Bumbai Patna Mai Haru Calcutta
Meree Patalee Kamar Meree Tirchhi Najar
Meree Patalee Kamar Meree Tirchhi Najar
Meree Chadhti Jawanee

Chhamma Chhamma Ae Chhamma Chhamma

Tere Pas Aau Teree Sanson Me Samau Raja
Tere Pas Aau Teree Sanson Me Samau Raja
Teree Ninde Churalu

Dekha Dekhee Dil Meraa Jud Gaya Re

Dekha Dekhee Dil Meraa Jud Gaya Re

snippet.title: Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics) ft. beabadoobee
snippet.description:
Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head)
STREAM & DOWNLOAD:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📌 Similar vibes & playlists:
► Late Night Pop & Electronic Lyrics → https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlHNBTZe9-dvCN99ICQzArXFZ4z58Sh0C
► New Emotional Pop & Electronic (2026) →https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlHNBTZe9-dsDJ0iwECLZpVikUXp58bXd

🎧 [LYRICS]:
Don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

Yeah...
I don't wanna fall asleep, I don't wanna pass away
I been thinking of our future cause I'll never see those days
I don't know why this has happened, but I probably deserve it
I tried to do my best, but you know that I'm not perfect
I been praying for forgiveness, you been praying for my health
When I leave this earth, hoping you'll find someone else
Cause yeah, we still young there's so much we haven't done
Getting married, start a family, watch your husband with his son
I wish it could be me, but I won't make it off this bed
I hope I go to heaven, so I see you once again
My life was kinda short, but I got so many blessings
Happy you were mine, it sucks that it's all ending

Don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

And I, don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

I'm happy that you're here with me, I'm sorry if I tear up
When me and you were younger you would always make me cheer up
Taking goofy videos while walking through the park
You would jump into my arms every time you heard a bark
Cuddle in your sheets, sang me sound asleep
And sneak out through your kitchen at exactly 1:03
Sundays went to church, on Mondays watched a movie
Soon you'll be alone, sorry that you have to lose me

Don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

And I, don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

Don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

And I, don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

And I, don't stay awake for too long
Don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 
बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

घर त मेरो यहाँ हैन बाँके बर्दिया 
तिम्रो रुपले ए कान्छि दिलै चोर्दिया

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

माईला दाई हजुर, केछ केटा हो हल्लिचल्ली
ठिक छ दाई, दामी दामी दामी 
कता हो हामी ?

बर्दियामा हो दाई कता जानू खै 
पाँच बर्ष लभ परेको गर्लफ्रेन्ड पोइल गै 
हाहाहा ... हाहाहा..
मान्छे बौलाएसी कस्को के लाग्छ र खै 

भेट्न आउछु भन्थी मलाई कोहलपुरको चोकमा 
एक कार्टुन रक्सी खाएँ मैले रिसको झोकमा 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

कता कता - यता यता 
कता कता - यता यता 

तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म 
तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म

Beerko CC aayo kamal bc
Beerko CC aayo kamal bc

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Gharta mero yaha hoina banke Bardiya 
Timro ruple e kanxi dilai chordiya

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Maila dai hajur kexa keTa ho hallichalli
Thik xa dai dami dami dami 
Kata ho hami 
Bardiyama ho dai kata janu khai

5 Barsa love pareko girlfriend poila gai
Haha haha haha 
Manxe baulayasi kasko k lagxa ra khai

Vetna aauxu vanthi malai Kohalpurko chok ma
1 kartun raksi khaya maile risko jhokma

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Kata kata- yata yata 
Kata kata - yata yata 

Timrai saurai lagyapaxi timlai vetna man lagyo jhyamma jhyamma

snippet.title: New Bhojpuri Song | Khesari Lal New Song Roti Garam | Namrita Malla | Shilpi Raj | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
“रोटी गरम” में खेसारी लाल यादव, नम्रिता मल्ला और शिल्पी राज का धमाका छा गइल बा, फुल मस्ती और डांस के साथ अभी देखीं 🚀

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:
Singers: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj
Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ
Lyrics: Abhishek Babu Yadav (ABY)
Additional Vocal - Vipul Pandey , Gangesh Raja , Ajay Singh Aj

Video Credits:
Featuring: Khesari Lal Yadav & Namrita Malla
Video Design & Directed: Sooraj Katoch
DOP: Rahul Yadav
Choreographer: Shoki & Lokesh
Video Edit: Srikanth (ZAV Studio)
AD: Geeta Tamta (Zenith)
Costumes: Reema Katoch (Zai Fashions)
Dancers: Zenith Dance Troupe
Production: Rohit Seth (Zenith)
Associate: Alex
Asst.: Prince Yadav
Focus Puller: Anish
Makeup: Aryan Rajesh
Hair: Sonu
BTS: Chetan, Pujan (ZAV Studio)
Colourist: Govindpuria

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..


Antra: -1
chorus: -
धक धक का धक धक का धक धक जिया करे
जब आके मौका पाके उ कोरा भरे ...

Male: -
कइसे के नैना चार भइल 
कइसे शुरु राते प्यार भइल
कांचे कसइली रहल बदनिया 
कइसे फुला के अनार भइल

Female: -
अँखिया से अँखिया लड़ल रहे 
दिल में बेचैनी बढ़ल रहे 
चुम्मा लेवे में हाय रामा ढाढी गढ़ल रहे  -२
बलमा मोरा बलमा मोरा बलमा बेशरम पिया
जला के जोबन पे ...

Antra: -2
Chorus: -
क ख ग घ पढ़लू ह का 
नाईट फलाइट पे चढ़लू ह का 

Male: -
धीरे धीरे कइसे सीन भइल 
मामला कब रंगीन भइल 
रसगुल्ला जइसन मीठ मीठ  देहिया
कइसे ए  गोरी नमकीन भइल 

Female  :-
कनवा के बाली टूट गईल
होठवा के लाली छुट गईल
फुलवा के डाली पाके भवरा लूट गईल -२
(हम अनाड़ी )
उई मा उई मा उई मा नाही मरम दिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा...

#rotigaram
#khesarilalyadav 
#namritamalla 
#shilpiraj 
#mungda 
#newbhojpurisong 
#newbhojpurigana 

Learn to sing in Sur with AI Powered Personal Music Teacher- Padhanisa by Saregama. Download Padhanisa App now; https://sarega.ma/padhanisa

Follow us on:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/3FxwPgo 
Instagram: https://bit.ly/32rkJqM

hi.description:

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:

Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ

Associate: Alex

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..
